/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/RaylibGame.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RaylibGame.dir/src/Location.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RaylibGame.dir/src/Button.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RaylibGame.dir/src/ButtonMgr.cpp.o -o RaylibGame  /usr/local/lib/libraylib.a -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo -L/usr/local/lib -lraylib
